name: Untitled Idea
tagline: A safe fallback page for rough notes, blank submissions, and ideas that need a title later.
thesis: Untitled Idea proves the launch system can keep even messy first drafts shareable without breaking the customer-facing site. Instead of publishing broken copy, the route becomes a clean holding page until the owner adds a real title, sharper thesis, and launch plan.
audience: Builders who text or paste a rough idea before they know what to call it.
proofPoints: The route stays valid even when the original idea input is empty or malformed.
The page explains that it is a draft instead of pretending the concept is finished.
A later commit can replace the fallback copy without changing the public URL.

launchChecks.label: Add real title and target customer
Replace fallback copy with customer-ready positioning
